flashcards.back: Logic is the study of reasoning and argumentation.

flashcards.front: What are the types of logic?
flashcards.back: There are several types of logic, including propositional logic, predicate logic, and description logic.

flashcards.front: What is the purpose of the AND operator?
flashcards.back: The AND operator is used to combine two statements that are both true.

flashcards.front: What is the difference between BFS and DFS?
flashcards.back: BFS explores all nodes at the current depth before moving to the next depth, while DFS explores as far as possible along each branch before backtracking.

flashcards.front: What is the time complexity of the Uniform-Cost Search strategy?
flashcards.back: The time complexity of the Uniform-Cost Search strategy is O(b^d).
